premiumSeo.intro: The {tool} helps you pressure-test a job before you commit to a price. It turns your costs, quantities, and rates into a clear margin and risk read, so you can spot the hidden drivers that quietly erode profit and decide with confidence instead of guessing on the bid.
premiumSeo.problem: Most jobs lose margin long before the invoice, when setup, rework, overruns, and underpriced line items are never added up before the quote goes out. The {tool} makes those drivers visible so they stop surprising you.

premiumSeo.outputs: {tool} returns {outputs} with metrics, threshold alerts, and risk drivers — so you see why the number lands where it does and what to adjust.

homeAbout.title: About Us
homeAbout.paragraph1: Profit often leaks from businesses through unnoticed costs, not sales. Incorrect pricing, calculation errors, waste, efficiency loss, and weak quoting discipline silently erode margins over time.
homeAbout.paragraph2: SectorCalc is engineered to make these invisible losses quantifiable. It elevates cost, proposal, efficiency, and risk decisions onto a faster, more transparent, and reliable baseline.
homeAbout.beliefSubtitle: Precision in calculation is the foundation of reliable performance.
homeAbout.highlightPrimary: A platform to expose hidden losses,
homeAbout.highlightSecondary: and transform computation into reliable decision support.

hero.title: Computation, turned into reliable decisions.
hero.lead: SectorCalc is a global industrial calculation and decision support platform that helps businesses expose hidden losses and act on them with confidence.

why.title: Why SectorCalc exists
why.body: Most operational losses never appear on an invoice. They hide in pricing, scrap, setup time, efficiency drops, and weak quoting discipline, and they erode margins quietly for years.

problem.title: The problem we solve
problem.body: Teams make cost, quote, and risk decisions on incomplete information. SectorCalc makes the invisible measurable, so decisions rest on evidence instead of guesswork.

different.title: What makes us different
different.body: Every result carries a transparent calculation summary, indicative regional benchmarks, and documented assumptions you can review with your team before acting.

who.title: Who it is built for
who.body: Owner-operators, estimators, field teams, and consultants who need fast, reliable answers without hiring a full pricing desk or deploying enterprise software.

descriptions.default: Component of the calculated loss breakdown.
descriptions.overproduction: Excess production beyond demand. Often caused by poor forecasting, large batch habits, or unbalanced production plans.
descriptions.waiting: Idle time losses. Caused by bottlenecks, unplanned downtime, or material shortages.
descriptions.transport: Unnecessary movement. Poor layout, repeated handling, or unoptimized routes.
descriptions.inventory: Excess stock. Driven by forecast error, high safety stock, or slow-moving items.
descriptions.motion: Unnecessary operator movement. Missing 5S, ergonomics issues, or hard-to-reach tools/materials.
descriptions.defects: Scrap and rework. Weak quality control, process variation, or material issues.
descriptions.overprocessing: Extra processing steps. Unneeded inspections, approvals, or over-engineering.
descriptions.annualloss: Annualized loss projection based on frequency and working days.

actions.default: Review root causes with your operations team and define a measurable improvement target.
actions.overproduction: Align production planning to demand, review Kanban levels, and reduce batch sizes where feasible.
actions.waiting: Analyze bottlenecks, apply SMED to cut setup time, and improve preventive maintenance.
actions.transport: Redesign material flow, shorten routes, and consolidate transfer batches.
actions.inventory: Review stock levels, apply JIT where possible, and run ABC analysis on slow movers.
actions.motion: Apply 5S and ergonomics improvements to reduce non-value movement.
actions.defects: Stand up a quality improvement team, run root-cause analysis, and add poka-yoke where practical.
actions.overprocessing: Value-stream the process and remove steps the customer does not pay for.
actions.dailyloss: Validate daily loss assumptions with shop-floor data before scaling actions.
actions.annualloss: Prioritize the highest annual-loss drivers in your kaizen backlog.
actions.dataconfidencemultiplier: Improve data confidence with meter readings, time studies, or ERP extracts.

sections.title: Indicative decision support
paragraphs: Calculators and pro report previews on SectorCalc are indicative decision-support tools.
They are designed to structure thinking — not to certify bids, margins, safety, compliance, or financial statements.
Outputs depend on the numbers and assumptions you enter.

sections.title: Not professional advice
paragraphs: SectorCalc is not a substitute for professional cost accounting, engineering review, tax advice, legal counsel, or industry-specific compliance review.
Engage qualified professionals before committing to contracts, pricing, or capital decisions.

sections.title: Benchmarks and claims
paragraphs: Unless explicitly stated on a specific page or tool, SectorCalc does not claim independent industry benchmarks or third-party verified market data in the MVP.
Do not treat example or sample reports as results for your business.

sections.title: No outcome guarantee
paragraphs: SectorCalc does not guarantee revenue, margin, win rates, safety outcomes, or client results.

section1.title: 1. Our Services
section1.content: SectorCalc provides industrial and business calculators for informational and decision-support purposes. Our tools do not constitute professional engineering, financial, or legal advice. You are solely responsible for verifying any results before making business decisions.

section2.title: 2. Pro Features & Credits
section2.content: Pro tools require credits. Credits are non-refundable and expire 12 months after purchase. You may purchase credit packages through our secure payment provider. Unused credits do not roll over.

section3.title: 3. User Accounts
section3.content: You must create an account to access pro features. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

section4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
section4.content: All content, formulas, algorithms, designs, and trademarks are the exclusive property of Sector Calculator (operating as SectorCalc). You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written permission.

section5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
section5.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Sector Calculator shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services.

section6.title: 6. Modifications
section6.content: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

section7.title: 7. Contact Information

privacy.heroDescription: What data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: We collect personal information you provide (e.g., email address when you register). We also automatically collect usage data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) to improve our tools.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use your data to operate, maintain, and improve SectorCalc, to process payments, and to communicate with you about your account or updates.

section3.title: 3. Cookies & Tracking
section3.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and optional analytics cookies (e.g., Google Analytics) to analyze usage. You can disable non-essential cookies in your browser settings.

section4.title: 4. Data Sharing
section4.content: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only with trusted third-party services (payment processors — Stripe/Paddle, hosting — Vercel) as necessary to provide our services.

section5.title: 5. Data Retention & Security
section5.content: We retain your data as long as your account is active. We implement reasonable security measures, but no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.content: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at info@sectorcalc.com.

section7.title: 7. Children's Privacy
section7.content: Our services are not directed to individuals under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

section8.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
section8.content: We may update this policy from time to time. The "Effective" date at the top indicates when the latest version was posted.

refundPolicy.heroDescription: Refund terms for credit purchases and subscriptions.
refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.intro: We want you to be satisfied with your purchase. Please read this Refund Policy carefully.

section1.title: 1. Credits & Subscriptions
section1.content: Credits: Purchases of credits are final and non-refundable. Unused credits expire 12 months after purchase. No cash refunds will be issued for unused credits. Subscriptions: If you purchase a recurring subscription, you may request a full refund within 14 days of your first payment, provided you have not used any pro tool during that period. After 14 days or after first use, subscription fees are non-refundable.

section2.title: 2. Faulty or Incorrect Tools
section2.content: If a pro tool produces demonstrably incorrect results due to a bug in our system, we will refund the credits used for that calculation (up to the number of credits spent) or provide replacement credits. Please report the issue with screenshots and details to info@sectorcalc.com.

section3.title: 3. How to Request a Refund
section3.content: To request a refund, contact us at info@sectorcalc.com with your transaction ID (from your payment provider) and the reason for the request. We will respond within 7–14 business days.

section4.title: 4. Chargebacks
section4.content: If you initiate a chargeback without first contacting us, we may suspend your account until the matter is resolved.

section5.title: 5. Changes to this Policy
section5.content: We reserve the right to modify this refund policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page.

section6.title: 6. Contact Information
section6.content: For refund requests or billing questions, contact us using the details below.

verify.metaTitle: Verify Calculation Report — SectorCalc Trust Trace
verify.metaDescription: Cryptographic verification of a SectorCalc pro calculation report. Verify authenticity, integrity, and issuance status.
verify.title: Cryptographic Verification
verify.description: Verifying calculation report authenticity and integrity via SHA-256 hash against the SectorCalc approved registry.
verify.verifiedMessage: This report has been cryptographically verified by the SectorCalc Trust Trace system. The calculation record is authentic and has not been tampered with.
verify.notFoundMessage: No matching approved report was found in the SectorCalc registry.
verify.notFoundHelp: This hash is not yet linked to a verified calculation. Reports are registered at the time of a pro calculation export. If you scanned a QR code from a valid report, please ensure the entire hash was captured correctly.
verify.revokedHelp: A revoked report is no longer considered valid. Contact the issuer for an updated report.
verify.hashMismatchMessage: Cryptographic hash does not match stored report data. The report may have been tampered with or the data is corrupted.
verify.hashMismatchHelp: This indicates the stored calculation data does not match its original cryptographic seal. The report cannot be verified. Contact the issuer for an authentic report.
verify.errorMessage: Verification service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
verify.formServiceUnavailable: Verification service is unavailable. Try again shortly.
verify.formHashMismatch: Report found, but the calculation hash does not match.
verify.formRevoked: This report exists but has been revoked.
verify.summaryDisclaimer: Technical simulation. Not financial, legal, or engineering advice. Disclaimer v{version}.

verify.saveFailed: Could not save summary. Please try again.

howItWorks.title: Methodology, outputs and limitations
howItWorks.lead: SectorCalc is a sector-specific measurement and decision platform. Free checks build trust; pro verdicts deliver the decision layer operators need before quoting.
howItWorks.privacyNote: Free checks run without ERP setup. Business data is not sold.

sections.title: What the free check shows
bullets: Visible risk signal only
Directional cost exposure summary
No minimum safe price floor
No final verdict or saved report

sections.title: What the pro verdict adds
bullets: Minimum safe price or bid floor
Margin leak breakdown
Accept / reprice / reject verdict
PDF-ready report and saved history (Pro)
Sector-specific field sets per tool
Visible labels and helper text
No raw formula sheets exposed to users

sections.title: Risk signals
bullets: LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH visible on free tier
Pro adds verdict labels and leak drivers
Risk is text + level — not color alone
Signals are decision-support, not certified audit

sections.title: Safe price logic
sections.body: Where applicable, pro calculators compute a minimum safe price or bid floor from direct cost, target margin and sector-specific buffers (setup, scrap, tooling, delay). The exact model varies by sector — CNC machine shops, construction change orders and cleaning contracts use different drivers.
bullets: Target margin applied to loaded direct cost
Sector buffers for setup, scrap or delay
Scenario rows at multiple margin targets
Safe price withheld on free tier intentionally

sections.title: Report limitations
sections.body: All outputs are technical simulations and decision-support estimates. They are not financial, legal, engineering or tax advice. SectorCalc does not replace professional estimating, cost accounting or contractual review.
bullets: Not certified financial or engineering advice
Verify all numbers before commercial commitments
Models simplify real-world variability
Subscription does not guarantee business outcomes

sections.title: Data privacy
sections.body: Free checks run without ERP setup and without requiring an enterprise rollout. Business data is not sold. Saved reports and account data are linked to your SectorCalc login when you choose to save or subscribe.
bullets: Free checks run without ERP setup
Business data is not sold
Stripe handles subscription billing securely
See Privacy Policy for retention details

methodology.title: No black boxes. Every formula cited.
methodology.lead: Engineering tools that engineers can trust. Sources shown, assumptions stated, edge cases documented.
methodology.card1Desc: Every calculator cites its source. ASME UG-27, ISO 5349, NIOSH lifting equation — no invented formulas, no guesswork.
methodology.card2Desc: Each tool links to its full derivation, guard conditions and known limitations. You know exactly what you're computing.
methodology.card3Desc: Results are decision-support, not sign-off. Every tool states its scope clearly. No false precision.
